title: anthemis cretica subsp. panachaica
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. panachaica, also known as Mountain Camomile or Anthemis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. panachaica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and easing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for a range of applications to harness its medicinal properties.
